title: Thai Shrimp Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Thai-inspired shrimp stir fry with tender shrimp, toasted rice, and a tangy tom yum sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the chopped fresh tom and cook for 1-2 minutes, until slightly softened.
Add the toasted rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the tom.
Add the tom yum sauce to the skillet and stir to combine with the rice and tom.
Return the cooked shrimp to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Season with salt and sugar to taste.
Serve the shrimp stir fry hot, garnished with chopped Thai basil.
